head_commit.message: fix(map): optimize visualization and add native topological snapping
fix(map): correct marker alignment and add city info panel
fix: dual geo layers - Goryeo on top of Yuan
fix: z-order Goryeo on top + 70 cities
feat: smooth polygon borders + gold-toned province/state borders
style: round all UI corners for polished look
fix: merge geo components to enable roaming over provinces
style: fix UI overlap by changing controls to horizontal layout
fix: replace boundingCoords with dummy features to prevent zoom overflow
fix: use boundingCoords to perfectly align multi-geo layers
feat: add robust historical cities and passes for 1351
